programme.desc: Viola Vitale, Miss Italy and fashion journalist, returns to Sicily to look for her father. He starts working for a digital news company and teams up with police inspector Francesco Demir to solve crimes with the help of synesthesia.

programme.title: The Wrong Man (VO)
programme.desc: Rich restaurant owner Özgür prefers casual encounters to serious relationships. Ezgi wants to get married, but ends up being used by men. Özgür agrees to give him dating tips so that his next relationship with Serdar will work out.

programme.title: Room 309 (VO)
programme.desc: Onur and Lale go on a blind date arranged by their mothers and wake up the next morning in the same bed.

programme.title: 28 Dias
programme.desc: Gwen Cummings is a successful writer from New York, devoted to a life of clubs, parties and hangovers. Everything changes when, after a shameful accident while driving a limousine after his sister's wedding, he has to choose between prison or rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Claire forms a connection with her young patient, whose issues with her mother make Claire think about her own relationship with her mother. Morgan and Park treat a patient with a swordfish stuck in his leg.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A conspiracy theorist questions Dr. Neil Melendez. Dr. Claire Brown treats a woman whose inability to feel pain is threatening both her marriage and her life. Dr. Shaun Murphy and Dr. Aaron Glassman face crises in their romantic relationships.

programme.title: Eternal love (VO)
programme.desc: Ozan discovers something unexpected when he accuses his family. Asu tells Hakki her plan and Emir waits for someone to show up at the meeting.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: The tension between Halit and Nadir explodes after a public gesture involving Yildiz. As Ender finds herself caught between dangerous alliances, personal conflicts threaten to destroy everything.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem dreams of living in the Galapagos Islands and being a writer, but her mother wants her to find a job. When she gets it at an advertising agency, the young woman kisses Can at the company's birthday party.

programme.title: Certain Women
programme.desc: An inspiring look at three women who struggle to carve their own path across the vast plains of the American Northwest.

programme.title: Certain Women
programme.desc: The lives of Laura, Gina, Jamie and Beth have little in common other than the fact that they live in Montana. But destiny takes care of making their stories intersect, in an intimate and profound way, as they search for a place in the world.

programme.title: Paper Towns
programme.desc: Quentin, a university student, has been in love with the enigmatic neighbor Margo since childhood. After taking him with her on a one-night adventure around her hometown, Margo disappears, but leaves a series of cryptic clues for Quentin to decipher.

programme.title: War of the Sexes
programme.desc: The real story of the tennis game in 1973, which pitted world No. 1 Billie Jean King and former champion Bobby Riggs face-to-face on the court - in a true war of the sexes.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Claire forms a connection with her young patient, whose issues with her mother make Claire think about her own relationship with her mother. Morgan and Park treat a patient with a swordfish stuck in his leg.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun, Park and their new assistant treat a conspiracy theorist who insists he needs liver surgery because he was poisoned, not because of a genetic disease.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Yildiz is suspicious of Alihan's trip to China and fears that old habits will return, which tests Zeynep's confidence.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Huma cries when she realizes that Selim is a swindler. Sanem decides to return to live with his parents.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Salvatore and Gabriella take care of Tina's participation in the singing competition, to the delight of the employee, who finally feels closer to the handsome Amato.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Tina receives a visit from Walter Belli, a music producer impressed by the girl's talent. Tina's enthusiasm, however, is short-lived: she will be able to participate in the singing competition as long as she does it without her friend Paolo.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Huma cries when she realizes that Selim is a swindler. Sanem decides to return to live with his parents.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: The tension between Halit and Nadir explodes after a public gesture involving Yildiz. As Ender finds herself caught between dangerous alliances, personal conflicts threaten to destroy everything.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Forty-year-old and single again, Bridget Jones focuses on work. But after meeting Jack, a dashing American, Bridget is surprised by a... pregnancy! The problem is that she is only 50% sure about the identity of the baby's father...

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem begins delivering the store's products to your home to improve sales. Sanem refuses to attend the cream campaign party, but Muzaffer and JJ set a trap to force her to go.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: With two new investigations in hand, Demir tries to deal with the guilt he feels regarding what happened to Farah. Viola makes an important decision about her relationship with Raniero.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Özgür accompanies Ezgi and gives her tips on what she has to do for Dr. Serdar to fall in love with her. Levent introduces Cansu to his daughter as a friend. Ozan falls in love.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Koray surprises Nergis and takes her out for a romantic dinner. Koray tries to kiss Nergis against his will and ends up getting slapped. Lale returns home and finds Onur very distraught.

programme.title: Prometo Amar-te
programme.desc: A car accident leaves Paige in a coma. When she wakes up and reveals that she is suffering from total memory loss, Leo, her husband, has no alternative but to commit himself to winning her over. For the second time...

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun has his first surgery as lead surgeon, but it doesn't go as planned. Claire, Morgan and Melendez treat an alcoholic man who appears to have relapsed, but whose wife's unwavering faith in him ends up saving his life.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: While performing his first solo surgery, Dr. Shaun Murphy kicks out a nurse; Dr. Neil Melendez disagrees with Dr. Audrey Lim regarding risky surgery; Dr. Claire Browne spirals into self-destructive behaviors.

programme.title: eternal love
programme.desc: Emir is certain that he will soon find his brother. However, at the end of the night, a big surprise awaits the whole family.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit uncovers a betrayal that pits Yildiz against Ender, while Sahika moves her pieces to gain power. Alliances are broken, and the conflict between everyone becomes irreversible.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Leyla gets a better position at the agency for her great effort. Sanem ruins a very important meeting and, because of him, they have to find someone to pretend to be Arthur Capello.

programme.title: ABC of Seduction
programme.desc: Abby is young, beautiful and a television producer, but her love life is a disaster and everyone knows it. When Mike Chadway is hired to spice up Abby's show, the seeds are sown for a battle of the sexes the likes of which haven't been seen in a long time...

programme.title: Evening Program
programme.desc: Katherine Newbury, the mythical host of a famous talk show, is accused of not contributing to the female cause because she only works with men. Katherine then hires Molly, an inexperienced young woman of Indian origin, to collaborate on the program.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: The wanted
programme.desc: Henry Fonda is a priest persecuted by the authorities after the government has banned religion. His decision is to flee to another country, but at the border he will have difficulty getting out and will have to disguise himself. The film, directed by John Ford, is based on a novel by Graham Greene.

programme.title: Mystery at the Florist: A suspicious burial
programme.desc: When a body appears at her cousin's wedding, a former lawyer florist sets out to investigate a crime that hides family secrets and unexpected dangers.

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Point Break (Sin límites)
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'They Call Him Bodhi', directed in 1991 by Kathryn Bigelow ('The Darkest Night'). Johnny, a young FBI agent, infiltrates a team of elite athletes led by Boshi. Johnny's mission is to discover if the gang is behind a series of deaths and unusual robberies that are causing the world economy to plummet. Therefore, covertly and trying not to discover his true identity, the agent will have to risk his life to find evidence that will allow him to incriminate the gang and capture it. However, when he begins to form a friendship with the leader, Johnny will question whose side he is on and what he should do.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: Red hot
programme.desc: Art Jeffries is an FBI agent with respect problems for his superiors. One day he is assigned to investigate the case of a missing boy, Simon, whose parents have been murdered. After finding him, he discovers that he is a nine-year-old autistic boy with a prodigious ability to reveal supposedly insurmountable government codes.

programme.title: Terrorist threat
programme.desc: Ewan, an agent of the British Secret Service, has the mission to capture and eliminate Ash, a university student turned suicide bomber, as well as the cell to which he belongs.

programme.title: Haute couture
programme.desc: Esther, first seamstress at the House of Dior, works on her latest Haute Couture collection, before retiring. Jade, a 20-year-old girl, steals her purse on the subway. Days later, repentant, she decides to go and return it. Esther decides to offer him a chance.

programme.title: The jury
programme.desc: A young New Orleans widow files a civil lawsuit against a powerful corporate consortium whom she blames for her husband's death. Thus, a multimillion-dollar case is launched. Judicial thriller based on a novel by John Grisham, a best-selling writer who is well versed in all the ins and outs of United States law.

programme.title: Essence of woman
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'Scent of a Woman', from 1974. Charlie is a young man who studies at a private school thanks to a scholarship. In order to get some money, he works on weekends. One day, he becomes the guide for a rude retired colonel who suffers from blindness and is ready to commit suicide. Little by little, the cold relationship between the two grows closer into a beautiful friendship that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: force team
programme.desc: With the American football league very advanced and the possibility of reaching the finals, the Washington Sentinels players decide to go on strike. To solve such a delicate situation, the team owner hires legendary coach Jimmy McGinty and proposes an almost impossible challenge: recruit a team of substitutes in one week. Once the first step is taken, you will have to face an even more difficult mission; coach this peculiar group of unknown and somewhat "losing" players, led by Shane Falco.

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: The wanted
programme.desc: Henry Fonda is a priest persecuted by the authorities after the government has banned religion. His decision is to flee to another country, but at the border he will have difficulty getting out and will have to disguise himself. The film, directed by John Ford, is based on a novel by Graham Greene.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Running at full speed around the track, doing everything around, over and through the competition. Speed ​​Racer is a born racer, born to drive racing cars. Speed ​​is aggressive, instinctive and, above all, reckless. His only competition is the memory of his brother, his idol, the legendary Rex Racer, whose death in a race has left a goal that Speed ​​feels the need to fulfill. Speed ​​feels a great loyalty to the family racing business run by his father, Pops Racer, the designer of the powerful Mach 5 car he pilots. When Speed ​​rejects a very lucrative and tempting offer from Royalton Industries, he not only angers the company's maniacal owner but also discovers a terrible secret: some of the most important races are being manipulated by a handful of heartless businessmen who manipulate the most important drivers to get more money. If Speed ​​does not drive for Royalton's team, Royalton will ensure that the Mach 5 never crosses the finish line. The only way Speed ​​can save his family's business and the sport he loves is to beat Royalton at its own game. With the support of his family and his loyal girlfriend, Trixie, Speed ​​teams up with his former rival, the mysterious Racer X, to win the race that killed his brother: the death-defying cross-country rally.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish is a boy who accidentally finds a board game called Jumanji and convinces his friend Sarah to try it, but very strange events begin to occur and the game will catch them and change their lives. By throwing the dice, Alan is transported to a parallel world, where he will not be able to leave until the game ends, but circumstances cause Sarah to leave and Alan is trapped for 26 years in that other world until two new children find the game and start playing.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Two years ago Peter Parker decided to accept his responsibility as Spider-Man and put his personal life aside; within which enter his great love Mary Jane Watson and his friend Harry Osborn, who feels a desire for revenge against Spider-Man for the death of his father. Peter's relationship with both of them is increasingly deteriorating. Peter's friend and role model, Dr. Otto Octavius ​​begins experimenting with fusion energy funded by the current president of Oscorp, who is Harry Osborn. But accidentally, the experiment becomes unstable, so his robotic arms fuse to his spine and he loses control, becoming the villainous Dr. Octopus. Despite this conflict with Octavius, Peter faces the emotional distress caused by knowing that his love Mary Jane is engaged to another man. This makes him think about what his life would be like without having to fight crime, so he will be forced to choose between his personal life as a student and his public obligations. Directed by Sam Raimi, it is the second film in the Marvel superhero saga made by this director, who is also known for his low-budget horror films such as "The Evil Dead" trilogy. He also produced television series such as "Hercules: His Legendary Journeys" or "Xena: Warrior Princess." Tobey Maguire plays Peter Parker in this first Spider-Man trilogy, who made his film debut with "This Boy's Life" and starred in films such as "Pleasantville", "Seabiscuit" and "The Great Gatsby". Kirsten Dunst plays Mary Jane Watson. This actress, model and singer was recognized at the age of 12 for her portrayal of a vampire in "Interview with the Vampire." He also participated in "Jumanji", "The Virgin Suicides" by Sofia Coppola and "Marie Antoinette". James Franco plays Harry Osborn, who began in the series "Freaks & Geeks" and participated in films such as "Milk" or "127 Hours."

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Due to radioactive mutations that man has been producing over the years for decades, the sea monster Godzilla appears from the depths of the sea to try to stop a series of monsters, animated by man's scientific arrogance, that threaten to destroy humanity.

programme.title: chain of favors
programme.desc: A child decides to carry out an experiment for his social sciences class with the intention of improving the world under a simple premise: he will do a series of favors for three people and in exchange he will ask them to "return" the favor by doing something for three other people, of whom they will ask the same. His idea becomes a national phenomenon, which also has profound consequences on his family.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Peter Parker and Mary Jane are finally together. They have both been able to accept their feelings and start a relationship. Mary Jane has landed a great role on Broadway and Peter continues to put on the Spiderman suit, helping those in need and capturing the city's criminals. Life seems to smile at them, even though their friend Harry continues to blame Peter for his father's death. But this is not the only threat that looms over the protagonists. An alien entity with symbiotic and violent behavior has arrived on Earth. Peter comes into contact with it, but even though his powers seem to increase when it envelops him, Peter realizes the dangers it poses and gets rid of it. The alien possesses Eddie Brocks, giving rise to a new and feared villain called Venom. At the same time, another villain begins to operate in the city, Sandman. Finally, Venom and Sandman kidnap Mary Jane and Spiderman must save her with the help of an unexpected ally. Director Sam Raimi was against the appearance of the Venom character in his film due to the character's lack of humanity. But producer Avi Arad convinced him that he had a large group of followers who read his stories in the Spider-Man comics and that he should appear. Topher Grace's performance definitely convinced him of Venom's appearance in this third installment of the saga. It took three years to make the special effects related to Sandman's powers, many experiments were carried out to analyze the behavior of the sand and digitally imitate it on the big screen.

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz
programme.desc: Frank Morris, a prisoner specialized in escapes with a very high intelligence quotient, is imprisoned in Alcatraz prison. In his head he keeps preparing an escape plan that will not be risk-free.

programme.title: No reservations
programme.desc: Kate Armstrong is a brilliant and demanding haute cuisine chef in charge of a famous restaurant. Her perfectionist and meticulous nature means that she does not accept criticism very well, which causes her boss to force her to go to therapy if she wants to continue maintaining her position as a chef. After the tragic death of her sister in a car accident, Kate is forced to take care of Zoe, her 9-year-old niece who has just been orphaned. Her new family situation causes Kate to face real problems reconciling her work day with taking care of Zoe, so her boss decides to give her a few days of vacation so she can adapt to the changes. After a few days of rest, Kate returns to work with more strength. However, upon her arrival the chef meets Nick Palmer, a chef who likes to take risks and bet on new ideas and who has been hired to replace her in her absence. The restaurant manager is delighted with Nick, so she decides to make him a permanent part of the staff, which will cause Kate to feel threatened. Rivalry will arise between both chefs due to their totally opposite characters and their different ways of working. Little by little, Kate and Nick will transform their rivalry into love, a process in which little Zoe will have a lot to do with.

programme.title: Love without an appointment
programme.desc: Romantic comedy from film director Ben Palmer, who focuses especially on directing television series, including "The Inbetweeners" and "Comedy Lab." Nancy is a thirty-four-year-old woman who spends another day of being hungover, tired of not having a partner and still being single at her age. Her group of friends try to advise her to find someone, but she is not up to the task and does not always listen to them. His parents have had a very different story from his and they enjoy the happiest and most perfect relationship. When Nancy heads through the streets of London on her way to her parents' anniversary, she can't imagine that she will meet someone who will change her destiny forever: Jack. Jack is a forty-year-old divorced man who mistakes her for his blind date, a girl ten years younger than Nancy. She takes advantage of the opportunity presented to her and pretends to be his blind date, thus beginning one of the craziest trips of her life with an unknown man with whom she soon hits it off. Nancy ends up thinking that Jack is the perfect boyfriend for her, but he keeps thinking that he is who he really is not. Lake Bell, the actress who plays Nancy in the film, used a British accent throughout filming, even when they were not filming, so the entire crew assumed that the actress was British and did not find out the truth until the end of filming. The film was shot entirely in the United Kingdom, with the majority of scenes in recording studios.

programme.title: It happened in Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa Ventura is a single, hard-working, intelligent and determined mother who dreams of achieving a better life. While she works hard as a cleaning lady in a luxurious Manhattan hotel, her heart falls in love with Christopher Marshall, a rising politician who, upon seeing her, mistakes her for one of the hotel's high-society guests.

programme.title: Adoptive parents
programme.desc: Coline and André are in perfect harmony with their daughter, Garance, and their son-in-law Harold. But Garance separates from Harold and orders his parents to never see him again, the in-laws cannot do it. They will have to lead a double life to continue seeing their beloved son-in-law.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: force team
programme.desc: With the American football league very advanced and the possibility of reaching the finals, the Washington Sentinels players decide to go on strike. To solve such a delicate situation, the team owner hires legendary coach Jimmy McGinty and proposes an almost impossible challenge: recruit a team of substitutes in one week. Once the first step is taken, you will have to face an even more difficult mission; coach this peculiar group of unknown and somewhat "losing" players, led by Shane Falco.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: In 1970, the Apollo 13 spacecraft makes one of many routine trips through space towards the Moon. Astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert, who were supposed to fly on Apollo 14, are relegated to this mission that is unimportant in popular opinion. Everything changes when the ship is already outside the Earth, heading towards the Moon, and an explosion inside the space module threatens the entire crew. This is the mission that made famous the phrase 'Houston, we have a problem' and tells the story of how the astronauts did everything possible to survive, at the same time that, from Earth, NASA workers tried to plan a strategy to bring their men back home. To achieve true weightlessness, the cast and crew flew in NASA's KC-135 plane, nicknamed 'The Vomit Comet.' Some of the scenes in which the Earth can be seen from the windows of Apollo 13, the images of the planet are photographs taken by astronauts Jim Lovell and Bill Anders on the Apollo 8 mission. In the original recording of the real Apollo 13 mission, the phrase Lovell pronounces is not 'Houston, we have a problem', but rather 'Ahh, Houston, we have had a problem.' According to the director, Ron Howard, that phrase indicated that the problem had already passed, so he decided to change it to the present, so that the tension would not decrease. Actor Brad Pitt had the opportunity to participate in this film, but he turned down the job to play the protagonist of 'Seven'.

programme.title: This house is a ruin
programme.desc: Anna (Shelley Long) is a young and attractive violinist who stays for a few days with her boyfriend, the lawyer Walter Fielding (Tom Hanks), in the luxurious apartment of her ex-husband, the great conductor Max Beissart (Alexander Godunov). They are happy, but they want to be even more so. Walter's formula is very simple, happiness is in a little house on the outskirts of New York with its white fence, a dog, two children and a little woman. But, at least for the moment, Anna's intentions do not involve marriage. However, the urgent need to look for a house is imposed when her ex-husband returns suddenly and needs to reoccupy her apartment. Walter turns to his friend Jack (Josh Mostel), a real estate agent, who provides him with a real bargain a few kilometers from New York, a dream house for very little money. After managing to raise the money, the couple buys the house from Estelle, its quirky owner (Maureen Stapleton). But unfortunately, mishaps begin to happen in this fabulous mansion: doorbells burn, the bed sinks, the door falls, steps break, ceilings fall apart, pipes shake and, as the final number, the staircase shatters. But since they still really like the house, with the best of their will they set out to fix the mess. They turn to the service of the unique Shirk brothers, Art (Joe Mantegna), the carpenter, and Brad (Carmine Caridi), the plumber.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

programme.title: Happiness never comes alone
programme.desc: Sacha is a true seducer who loves to go out, he ignores alarm clocks, engagement rings and taxes. Charlotte is a modern, independent woman who has three children, two ex-husbands, and runs a contemporary art foundation. There is no place for romance in his life. Although they are polar opposites, when they meet, they discover that they are made for each other.

programme.title: The truth about Charlie
programme.desc: Regina is thinking about divorcing Charlie. When she returns to Paris after her vacation in Martinique, her husband has been murdered and her checking account and home have been looted. Three of Charlie's former friends pursue her to recover money that she knows nothing about and the police see her as the main suspect. Her situation is increasingly dangerous and confusing, as she also has to face her feelings for Joshua, whom she met in Martinique.

programme.title: The mask of Zorro
programme.desc: 1821. The Mexican army strives to liberate its country from the Spanish yoke. In the Californias area, the evil Spanish governor, Don Rafael Montero, is about to lose everything. In a last attempt to catch his nemesis, the masked swordsman "Zorro", Montoro prepares to murder three innocents. With the help of two orphans, Joaquín and Alejandro Murrieta, Zorro frees the prisoners. Then he will give both boys a special medallion and flee on his horse, Tornado, after marking Montero with a small "Z" on his neck as a warning. But that same night the soldiers enter the house of a nobleman named Don Diego de la Vega and arrest him since they are convinced that he is the real Zorro. Don Diego's wife dies, he is locked up in prison and his daughter, Elena, is taken to Spain as Montoro's daughter, where he will raise her as if she were his own. Twenty years later, Montoro secretly returns to California and looks for Diego in prison but cannot find him because he is unrecognizable due to age. However, the prisoner does remember the man and with a thirst for revenge like he had never had before, he escapes from prison and decides to put an end to his enemy forever. Along the way he will discover Elena, his daughter, who is as beautiful as her mother when she was murdered. Tired, old and completely destroyed by the years of captivity, Don Diego de la Vega will decide to train an adult Alejandro Muerrieta, now a bandit and rogue, to become the new Zorro and avenge all the suffering that the evil Rafael Montero caused him. At first Anthony Hopkins rejected the role of Don Diego de la Vega because he had unbearable pain in his back. When a laser operation managed to alleviate the problem, he then offered to accept playing the wise old "Zorro."

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Inside Museums
programme.desc: Join cultural historian Janina Ramirez on a journey of discovery to unearth the story behind one of the world's most underrated art forms, the ornate Turkish ceramics known as Iznik tiles. Dizzying and gorgeous in their complexity, the tiles are the standout feature of some of Turkey's most beautiful buildings - and adorn great museums around the world. In the city of Istanbul, Janina heads off the beaten track to the Sadberk Hanım Museum, home of one of the world's finest collections of Iznik ceramics, and to the Rüstem Pasha Mosque, where she sees the art form at its height and learns how to decode its meanings. Heading to Iznik, the town that gave the tiles their name, Janina discovers how the art form was rediscovered after being lost for centuries - and meets an artist taking inspiration from Iznik design to create new forms of ceramics.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: John Simpson, in discussion with the BBC's unparalleled range of experts across the world, explores the impact of Israel's recent attacks on Lebanon, analyses the flotation of SpaceX and what it will mean for Elon Musk, and looks at the outcome of the election in Armenia.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: Not long ago, artificial intelligence was being sold as a science-fiction reality, a force that could transform society, cure disease, and remake the economy. Now, the mood is shifting. The companies driving the boom are racing for investment while grappling with a tougher reality: AI is costly, unpredictable, and not yet profitable. Even some of its creators warn progress may be too fast, as public anxiety grows and political resistance takes shape. Is AI now at a tipping point - caught between financial pressure, technological risk and a rising backlash?

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Climate Question
programme.desc: A global programme that reflects the variety of takes on climate change, how best to understand it and the world's attempts to avert it, temper it or adapt to it. It is not about questioning whether climate change is happening, it's about finding the best ways to respond to it. This is sharp-edged, analytical inquiry. Hard scrutiny, touched with a sense of adventure and discovery, and where we can find it, hope. It includes stories from across the world on why we find it so hard to save our own planet, and how we might change that.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: China's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The Yellow River - running for almost five and half thousand kilometres from west to east - is known as China's mother river. It's hailed as the cradle of Chinese civilisation and over thousands of years, it has fed billions of people and inspired generations of artists. Alastair explores the Yellow River and discovers some of the finest artwork from its valley, to understand how this unique natural phenomenon is deeply connected with the identity of the Chinese and the roots of their culture.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: The men's football World Cup begins in the US, Mexico and Canada. With matches being played in three different time zones, it presents an unprecedented challenge for the media. Alex Kay-Jelski, director of BBC Sport, Craig Hope, chief football reporter at the Daily Mail, and Daniel Storey, chief football writer at The i, set out their plans. Violent disorder on the streets in Belfast has followed a knife attack, with a Sudanese man who was granted refugee status in the UK in 2023 charged with attempted murder. Dan Johnson, BBC News correspondent, explains the challenge for journalists reporting from the ground. Russia's economic forum in St Petersburg played host to several Western social media stars. Influencers are now part of the messaging strategy for governments around the world. Samantha Berkhead, editor of The Moscow Times, and Evie Aspinall, director of the British Foreign Policy Group, discuss the reasons.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Adrienne Murray explores how new 3D imaging is being used to support heart procedures. Harriet Bradshaw finds out how gym equipment is being invented and tested to help astronauts exercise in space. Andrew Rogers chats to the game developers pitching the next big thing at the London Gaming Festival. And Shiona McCallum meets the medical expert testing out the future of prosthetics following his own near-fatal cycling accident.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: Not long ago, artificial intelligence was being sold as a science-fiction reality, a force that could transform society, cure disease, and remake the economy. Now, the mood is shifting. The companies driving the boom are racing for investment while grappling with a tougher reality: AI is costly, unpredictable, and not yet profitable. Even some of its creators warn progress may be too fast, as public anxiety grows and political resistance takes shape. Is AI now at a tipping point - caught between financial pressure, technological risk and a rising backlash?

programme.title: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Myanmar's civil war has claimed almost 100 thousand lives. In 2021, the country's military seized power in a coup - and after losing ground to rebel and ethnic groups, it's making a renewed push - carrying out the forced-recruitment of tens of thousands of conscripts - and employing new drone technology. The United Nations' human rights spokesman has condemned the military's tactics which he's called brutal, and he's said that civilians are paying a terrible price. BBC correspondent, Quentin Sommerville and camera journalist Darren Conway have spent time with rebel groups. This films contains some graphic scenes, including surgery and childbirth.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: As the World Cup kicks off who's cashing in and who's paying up? 2026 is set to be Fifa's most lucrative tournament ever with billions being earnt from tv rights and sponsorship deals as well as controversially high ticket prices. So how do broadcasters and sponsors make their huge investments pay-off? Ricardo Fort helps companies advertise at leading sports tournaments and shares his insights from his time as head of sponsorships at Visa and Coca-Cola. And as streaming giant Dazn tries to change the way the world watches live sport its CEO of Growth Markets, who oversees its football rights, Pete Oliver explains how new technology is changing viewing habits. Plus, Ben Thompson also hears from leading sports consultant Tony Simpson, from Oliver Wyman, about how these big tournaments boost economies and can leave a lasting legacy.

Terperangkap Di Alas Roban
programme.desc: Saat pulang dari liburan, bus yang ditumpangi Muham dan temannya mogok tepat di tengah wilayah angker. Mereka menolong seorang gadis yang ternyata disandera makhluk misterius di sana.

programme.title: Kepentok Cinta Sementara
programme.desc: Arga diultimatum pihak kampus untuk melunasi biaya kuliah, Arga sama sekali tidak mempunyai uang. Beruntung ada Bonar yang bersedia meminjamkan uang, namun ada syaratnya yaitu, menjadi pacar sementara adiknya.

programme.title: Married Failed
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Gara-Gara Kitab
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Radio Kabar Buruk
programme.desc: Seorang wartawan yang sering membuat marah atasannya karena lambat bekerja dan selalu ketinggalan berita. Setelah menemukan radio antik di Toko Kr. Amat, dia selalu mengetahui semua peristiwa-peristiwa penting.

programme.title: Bapakku Jago Karate
programme.desc: Dodi ingin melindungi Ersa dari orang yang suka mengganggunya. Karena itu, Dodi belajar Karate dari ayah Ersa. Ternyata guru dari lawan Dodi adalah musuh bebuyutan ayah Ersa.

programme.title: Tempe Mendoan Bumbu Cinta
programme.desc: Marvin adalah cowok tampan kaya raya yang sayang neneknya, dan sang nenek ingin sekali makan tempe mendoan. Marvin pun tak tahu pencariannya akan hidangan itu akan membawanya ke kisah asmara.

programme.title: Terperangkap Di Alas Roban
programme.desc: Saat pulang dari liburan, bus yang ditumpangi Muham dan temannya mogok tepat di tengah wilayah angker. Mereka menolong seorang gadis yang ternyata disandera makhluk misterius di sana.

programme.title: Orang Sakti Penabur Cinta
programme.desc: Sakit hati karena cintanya, Rian bersumpah tidak akan ada lelaki lain yang bisa mendekati Intan. Intan yang putus asa meminta bantuan kepada orang sakti penabur cinta, namun ternyata orang tersebut tidak seperti yang diduganya.

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Manusia Ikan Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya bangkrut, Risa terpaksa pindah ke sebuah kampung dekat laut. Di sana, saat dia nyaris tenggelam, tiba-tiba ada yang membawanya ke permukaan. Saat tersadar, dia hanya melihat sekilas manusia dengan sirip ikan.

programme.title: 7 Pusaka - Gasing Penghenti Waktu
programme.desc: Seorang penyanyi orkes melayu yang mulai kehilangan pamornya menemukan sebuah gasing bertuah yang dapat menghentikan waktu dan memakai kekuatan gasing itu untuk menghancurkan karier penyanyi baru saingannya yang cantik jelita.

programme.title: Bidadari Di Kebun Strawberry
programme.desc: Misi yang dijalankan seharusnya mudah, yaitu menaikkan penjualan strawberry, tapi ada saja yang menghalangi usahanya termasuk pria tampan yang tiba-tiba muncul.

programme.title: Janda Janda Jagoan
programme.desc: Maya, Anggi, dan Sindy adalah tiga perempuan jagoan yang berstatus janda. Mereka menjadi incaran penjahat. Vina, anak Anggi diculik oleh penjahat itu. Dapatkah tiga jagoan ini membebaskan Vina?

programme.title: From the Eyes Down to the Heart
programme.desc: Tanpa disangka Raisa bertemu kembali dengan Radit, cowok gebetan Raisa semasa SMU dulu. Raisa meminta bantuan Firsa, sahabatnya untuk memata-matai Radit. Setelah bertemu dengan Radit, Firsa malah jatuh hati kepada Radit.

programme.title: Mysterious Antique Car
programme.desc: Mobil yang dulunya merenggut nyawa ayahnya, kini menjadi kado ulang tahun untuk Dara. Yang bisa mengendarainya hanya ayahnya karena dia memiliki ilmu kekebalan. Mobil itu bisa dimusnahkan dengan dibakar pada saat bulan purnama.

programme.title: Ketemu Cinta Di Online Shop
programme.desc: Rayya adalah mahasiswa yang menekuni bisnis online. Dia mendapat saingan yaitu Pras, teman kampusnya yang juga punya bisnis toko online. Setelah kalah bersaing, Pras bekerja untuk Rayya, dan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Ketemu Cinta Di Online Shop
programme.desc: Rayya adalah mahasiswa yang menekuni bisnis online. Dia mendapat saingan yaitu Pras, teman kampusnya yang juga punya bisnis toko online. Setelah kalah bersaing, Pras bekerja untuk Rayya, dan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
Dead End
programme.desc: Saat Chang Sun memberikan tumpangan pada Wen Jou yang tengah tersesat, ia langsung jatuh cinta. Namun, Chang harus memperjuangkan cintanya karena kakak Wen, seorang gangster bernama Wen Chiang, tidak menyukainya.

programme.title: That Man In Chang-An
programme.desc: Kaisar Han meninggal dan Permaisuri Lu merebut alih kekuasaan. Ia merencanakan untuk membunuh pewaris takhta, Liu Heng. Namun, prajurit bertopeng mengetahui rencana jahatnya dan memberi tahu Liu.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: Sebagai hukuman atas perilaku buruknya, putri Kaisar Jade yang ke-tujuh diusir dari surga dan dikirim untuk tinggal bersama manusia. Di sana, ia jatuh cinta dengan seorang pemuda desa bernama Dong Young.

programme.title: Trilogy Of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: Film antologi kung fu tentang seorang pria yang mempermalukan dirinya sendiri, seorang PSK yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang jenderal dan sekelompok bandit yang berencana menyelamatkan seorang teman dari eksekusi.

programme.title: Oath Of Death
programme.desc: Tiga pendukung setia Sung bekerja sama untuk melawan para penjajah Tartar. Ma melepaskan putri dari penjajah Tartar yang diculik dalam sebuah upaya strategis untuk melawan para penjajah.

programme.title: The Magnificent Concubine
programme.desc: Kaisar tergila-gila pada Yang Gui Fei, selir kesayangannya, sehingga ia menyerahkan pemerintahan negara kepada Perdana Menteri. Namun, Perdana Menteri yang korup, membuat rakyat memberontak.

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Tersebar kabar jika Ku yang buta menyimpan rahasia Telapak Tangan Buddha. Ia pun diserbu dari berbagai pihak seperti burung-burung raksasa nan mengerikan dan kelompok-kelompok pendekar bela diri.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: Ling Yun berperan sebagai pemain pengganti yang disewa oleh sebuah band populer setelah pemain drum mereka yang egois mengundurkan diri untuk bergabung dengan band saingan mereka.

programme.title: Godfather Of Canton
programme.desc: Seorang komisaris ditangkap oleh utusan Cheng atas tuduhan korupsi dengan bantuan yang tak disengaja dari Lin. Saat bekerja untuk Cheng, Lin akhirnya mengetahui cara memperoleh uang suap dari Chang.

programme.title: Hong Kong Rhapsody
programme.desc: Hong Kong Rhapsody adalah film musikal yang penuh dengan lagu dan tarian. Peter Chen-Ho berperan sebagai pesulap playboy yang mengubah cara hidupnya setelah menjadi penjaga seorang penyanyi muda.

programme.title: Portrait In Crystal
programme.desc: Di film fantasi seni bela diri ini, jenderal Teng Wei Hao curiga bahwa sebuah lukisan kristal telah dikutuk dan menyebabkan beberapa pembunuhan. Ia mengutus anak buahnya untuk menyelidiki pencipta lukisan itu.

programme.title: A Friend From Inner Space
programme.desc: Shek Kin, yang biasa berperan sebagai tokoh jahat, mengambil peran langka di film komedi tentang hantu lucu yang berteman dengan seorang anak lelaki dan membantu sang anak menyatukan kembali orangtuanya yang berseteru.

programme.title: Let's Fall In Love
programme.desc: Film komedi romantis yang dibintangi artis legendaris Lin Feng Jiao ini menceritakan kisah cinta yang tak biasa antara putra seorang pengusaha dan keponakan perempuan dari seorang kepala sekolah taman kanak-kanak.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Setelah membunuh seekor harimau, Wu Sung mendapat kenaikan jabatan, namun ia malah terjebak dalam cinta segitiga yang tragis antara saudaranya yang buruk rupa dan istri saudaranya yang mencoba untuk menggodanya.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Setelah membunuh seekor harimau, Wu Sung mendapat kenaikan jabatan, namun ia malah terjebak dalam cinta segitiga yang tragis antara saudaranya yang buruk rupa dan istri saudaranya yang mencoba untuk menggodanya.

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: Para pembunuh bertopeng membuat kekacauan dan menebar teror dengan bersenjatakan trisula tajam yang mampu mengoyak tubuh manusia. Hanya tiga pendekar pemberani yang bersedia mencari tahu identitas mereka.

programme.title: Blue Skies
programme.desc: Cheng Pei-pei berperan sebagai seorang penyanyi muda bernama Hsiao-Yun yang bimbang antara kesuksesannya dalam karier dan hubungannya dengan sang kekasih, seorang pianis bernama Li Yen-nan.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Inilah kisah tentang kepolosan dan kegembiraan masa-masa remaja. Dua sahabat tumbuh bersama, namun persaingan muncul ketika mereka mengenal pria!

programme.title: The Bully
programme.desc: Mengikuti jejak film komedi kung fu 'ala Jackie Chan' yang populer, film aksi petualangan yang menghibur ini bercerita tentang seorang pelayan teraniaya yang belajar bela diri untuk menghajar seorang pelanggan kejam.

programme.title: The Love Eterne
programme.desc: Dalam drama peraih berbagai penghargaan arahan Li Han Hsiang ini, Betty Loh Ti berperan sebagai gadis cantik yang menyamar sebagai anak lelaki demi mendapatkan pendidikan yang terlarang bagi anak perempuan.

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Melodrama laga yang bercerita tentang pejuang wanita yang membesarkan putra musuhnya. Sementara itu, saudara kembar sang putra dibesarkan oleh musuh sang pejuang agar pada akhirnya kakak beradik itu akan saling membunuh.

programme.title: The Millionaire Chase
programme.desc: Peter Chen Ho adalah seorang playboy tampan yang mengencani tiga gadis kakak beradik, dan hal ini memicu serangkaian peristiwa konyol dan menghebohkan.

programme.title: Pursuit Of A Killer
programme.desc: Demi mewarisi kekayaannya, Fei menyewa seorang pembunuh untuk membunuh sang ayah yang ia benci. Namun, saat mengetahui bahwa saudara perempuannya adalah sang pewaris, Fei juga ingin membunuhnya.

programme.title: Return Of The Dead
programme.desc: Enchanted Shadow terdiri dari tiga kisah. Suami dan istri yang harus berhati-hati dengan apa yang mereka inginkan, hantu perempuan tanpa busana yang ingin balas dendam dan wanita tuna susila yang menjadi hantu.

programme.title: Killer Constable
programme.desc: Ketua Pengadilan Chan Koon Tai sungguh berdedikasi. Loyalitasnya yang berlebihan membuatnya mengejar seorang pencuri sadis yang bertekad untuk menghabisi anak buah Chan.

programme.title: Six Assassins
programme.desc: Tuan Li Ming adalah penguasa nan kejam yang menindas rakyat. Bahkan Kaisar yang merupakan saudaranya pun tak bisa menghentikannya. Pendekar pedang Mu menyamar sebagai penjaga Li Ming dan berencana untuk membunuhnya.

programme.title: The Land Of Many Perfumes
programme.desc: Biksu Tang San Zang, siluman kera, siluman babi, dan Sha Wu Jing berada di Womanland, tempat para wanita melahirkan bayi perempuan dengan meminum mata air ajaib.

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: Pendeta Alis Putih mendukung pemerintah Qing yang kejam, dan membakar kuil Shaolin serta memburu para muridnya. Hung dari Shaolin jatuh cinta pada Fang saat melarikan diri dan ia dibunuh oleh sang Pendeta.

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: Pendeta Alis Putih mendukung pemerintah Qing yang kejam, dan membakar kuil Shaolin serta memburu para muridnya. Hung dari Shaolin jatuh cinta pada Fang saat melarikan diri dan ia dibunuh oleh sang Pendeta.

programme.title: The Dream Of The Red Chamber
programme.desc: Film yang diadaptasi dari novel Dinasti Ching nan populer, kisah cinta yang menyentuh ini terbukti menjadi tantangan bagi banyak sineas film. Kombinasi klasik dari sastra abad ke-18 dan pembuatan film tahun 1960-an.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1933, 20.000 tentara dan 50 tank Jepang menyerbu Tembok Besar Tiongkok.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Saat mobil yang ditumpangi sejumlah gadis berpapasan dengan mobil yang ditumpangi beberapa pria, Ching Li dan Paul Chin Pei jatuh cinta. Namun, kisah cinta mereka tidak berjalan mulus.

programme.title: The Deadly Breaking Sword
programme.desc: Prajurit Tuan Chang Qing bertemu wanita penghibur Liu Yin Xi di sebuah kota kecil. Liu meminta Tuan untuk membunuh Guo Tian Sheng, yang dikenal sebagai 'Dokter Pembunuh', untuk membalas kematian tunangannya.

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: Nyonya Xu melihat seorang gadis kecil bermain sendirian di pintu masuk dari jauh setiap hari. Ia dengan hangat mengasuh gadis itu, lalu mengadopsinya dari orang tuanya yang tak memedulikannya.

programme.title: The Kid With The Golden Arm
programme.desc: Pemerintah mempekerjakan Yang untuk mengawal muatan emas ke daerah yang dilanda kelaparan. Geng Chi Sha, dengan salah satu petarung terbaik mereka, Golden Arm, berniat melakukan pembajakan dan membunuh karyawan Yang.

programme.title: Mr. Funnybone
programme.desc: Saksikan kelucuan Funny Bone saat ia berusaha memenangkan hati seorang wanita tangguh. Bersama dengan sahabat karibnya, Big Potato, seorang lelaki gagah yang selalu mengalami berbagai hal konyol.

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima bekerja untuk tuan Qin yang menderita penyakit mematikan dan hanya bisa disembuhkan oleh ramuan khusus. Qin mengirimnya dalam sebuah misi untuk mendapatkannya dan bertarung dengan senjata pamungkasnya, Rudal Naga!

programme.title: The Shepherd Girl
programme.desc: The Shepherd Girl, drama musikal tahun 1963 karya Shaw Brothers! Di film ini, Julie Yeh Feng berperan sebagai Hsiu Hsiu, gadis penggembala cantik yang jatuh cinta pada pelaut tampan bernama Liu Ta-lung.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam diburu saat mengetahui bahwa walikota dan kepala biro medis bersekongkol dengan seorang pengedar narkoba. Ia melarikan diri ke Shaolin untuk mempelajari kung fu demi membalaskan dendam teman-temannya.

programme.title: The Emperor And The Minister
programme.desc: Kaisar Qianlong bukanlah penerus takhta yang sah sejak lahir, tetapi ia baru mengetahui kebenarannya saat dua anggota senior organisasi rahasia anti-pemerintah menghubunginya beberapa tahun kemudian.

programme.title: The Singing Killer
programme.desc: Chiang Yi diperas untuk melakukan pencurian perhiasan oleh mantan bosnya yang mengancam akan mengungkap masa lalunya yang kelam. Masalah muncul saat ia mengetahui bahwa cinta pertamanya bekerja di toko itu.

programme.title: Notorious Eight
programme.desc: Chen Chi-chin kalah banyak dari penjudi berpengalaman Hu Kuan-ten. Ayahnya kalah dalam permainan kartu dan mati karena kaget. Chen meminta bantuan pamannya yang memanggil 7 rekan penjudi untuk melampiaskan dendam.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: Tiga pendekar kung fu dari latar belakang yang sangat berbeda menjadi murid Shaolin di kuil yang sama: Lo Lieh sang Pengawal Kerajaan, Lo Meng sang tentara yang melarikan diri, dan Wang Yu si pria desa.

programme.title: She Is In Danger
programme.desc: Xue menemukan bahwa Yi dan temannya telah membunuh mantan kekasih Yi, dan ia dikurung oleh keduanya untuk menutupi pembunuhan tersebut. Lalu, teman Xue, Wen, datang mencarinya. Bisakah mereka lolos dari bahaya?

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: Wong Fei-Hung adalah seorang pemuda yang nakal namun saleh, tetapi setelah serangkaian insiden, ayahnya yang frustrasi menyuruh seorang guru bela diri mabuk untuk mendisiplinkannya.

programme.title: Loving You
programme.desc: Seorang polisi yang pemarah dan suka main perempuan ditembak di kepala saat memburu seorang pengedar narkoba. Selama proses pemulihan, ia merenungkan kembali hidupnya dan berusaha memperbaiki pernikahannya yang hancur.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Long Wei mengalami gangguan pascatrauma usai kematian istrinya. Suatu hari, ia bertemu Amy yang bekerja di perusahaan teknologi VR dan diundang untuk menguji produk baru. Ia pun menjadi petarung VR perusahaan itu.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Seorang playboy kaya tewas akibat diledakkan oleh seorang gangster ketika ia menggoda istri gangster tersebut. Melalui serangkaian kejadian, profesornya membuatkan tubuh sintetis yang memungkinkannya untuk berubah menjadi apa pun yang diinginkannya.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: Raja Naga dikunci dalam segel oleh Tuan Naga selama 500 tahun, dan putri sang Raja harus kembali ke masa lalu guna membunuh Tuan Naga saat mengetahui bahwa keduanya adalah teman dekat di masa lalu.

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Valentino adalah penipu ulung yang bertemu dengan Kwan, sesama penipu. Bersama-sama, mereka menyamar sebagai berbagai orang dan menciptakan berbagai skema untuk menghasilkan uang. Sementara itu, para gangster sedang menyusun skema mereka sendiri.

programme.title: God Of Gamblers 2
programme.desc: Cho yang multitalenta ingin belajar dari Dewa Judi dan menghubungi muridnya. Mereka diserang oleh seorang bos kriminal yang berencana menyalahgunakan nama baik Dewa Judi untuk menghasilkan jutaan.

programme.title: Face To Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu tewas dalam sebuah kecelakaan ski. Kemudian, teman sekamarnya, Yoshio, menikahi istrinya serta mewarisi seluruh kekayaannya. Namun, segalanya berubah sejak Yoshio bertemu seorang pria tua di pemakaman Tamotsu.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agen Wen ditugaskan untuk menyamar sebagai pedagang senjata militer di Asia Tenggara guna menemukan beberapa amunisi dan menghancurkannya. Namun, ia diserang oleh gangster tak dikenal saat menemukan amunisi tersebut.

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: Sun Chung dan Ti Lung bersatu kembali untuk sebuah kisah menegangkan tentang seorang pendekar tua yang berusaha menebus kesalahannya di masa lalu melalui seorang anak jalanan yang bijaksana.

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: Sun Chung dan Ti Lung bersatu kembali untuk sebuah kisah menegangkan tentang seorang pendekar tua yang berusaha menebus kesalahannya di masa lalu melalui seorang anak jalanan yang bijaksana.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: The Mask Of Shura Of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: Klan Black Feather nan jahat menyusup ke wilayah Master Fire Cloud dan mencuri Topeng Shura, sehingga melepaskan roh jahat nan masih bayi. Namun, Master Fire Cloud mengadopsi bayi itu untuk mencegahnya menjadi jahat.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: Seorang polisi mengandalkan seorang pencuri mobil muda untuk menangkap empat gangster yang berencana merampok seorang pedagang kaya untuk mendapatkan sejumlah besar uang.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: Seorang Pendeta Taois tidak senang ketika rekan Pendeta Buddha-nya pindah ke sebelah rumahnya. Mereka sering terlibat perselisihan dan duel, tetapi segera harus mengatasi masalah mereka ketika seorang vampir keluar dari peti matinya dan mendatangkan malapetaka di pedesaan.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Seorang model (Joey Wong) diperkosa oleh seorang fotografer (Wilson Lam). Sementara itu, ia berselisih dengan sahabatnya (Carol Cheng) karena pacarnya (Alex Man), seorang polisi.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Berfokus pada migrasi Ip Man ke Hong Kong pada tahun 1949 saat ia berupaya menyebarkan disiplin ilmu bela diri Wing Chun yang dianutnya.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Bintang laga Chow Yun-Fat memerankan gangster sungguhan Chen Daqi saat ia naik ke eselon atas kekuasaan, mendapati dirinya terpecah antara cinta dua wanita, rencana pembunuhan dinas rahasia, dan ancaman perang yang membayangi.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Sebuah film fantasi-horor berlatar belakang Moskow masa kini, di mana masing-masing kekuatan yang mengendalikan siang dan malam saling bertempur.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Sebuah film fantasi-horor berlatar belakang Moskow masa kini, di mana masing-masing kekuatan yang mengendalikan siang dan malam saling bertempur.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Stephen Chow berangkat ke kota besar untuk mencoba menyelamatkan rumahnya dengan memenangkan turnamen snooker besar.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: Marbles, seorang anak berusia 10 tahun, menyaksikan pembunuhan seorang wanita muda.

programme.title: Let's Have A Baby
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah menarik tentang kerumitan dalam menciptakan anak, yang menampilkan penampilan komedi langka oleh Alex Man Chi Leung.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: Petualangan bersejarah nan epik berlatar masa-masa penuh gejolak di masa Tiga Kerajaan. Cao Cao berusaha untuk memasukkan Guan Yu ke dalam pasukannya, tapi Guan tetap setia pada Liu Bei, yang merupakan musuh Cao.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang tahun-tahun awal Republik Tiongkok, keluarga Kang yang kaya dibunuh secara brutal, dan putri kecil mereka satu-satunya saksi menghilang secara misterius.

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: Wei si badut, yang kemudian menjadi mata-mata rahasia, lalu menjadi pejabat tinggi di istana kekaisaran Tiongkok, berusaha sekuat tenaga untuk menghadapi faksi-faksi yang bertikai dan para ahli bela diri mematikan yang semuanya berebut kekuasaan.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: Putra dari keluarga kaya jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita yang hanya akan menikahinya setelah ia menjadi seorang Guru Kung-Fu. Dalam 'Drama Komedi' ini, ia menjadi pahlawan legendaris dengan berusaha menyelamatkan kaisar, dalam pencarian cintanya yang sebenarnya.

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts
programme.desc: The Second Time Around: (2025) Iris Prize-nominated short film. A young waiter is confronted by a mysterious older woman on a rainy night. [AD,S]

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Café Hon: The Café Hon restaurant in Baltimore is struggling because its owner has alienated the local community. Can Gordon help? (S5 Ep14) [S,SL]

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Naughty Naughty Secrets: Sitcom from Sam Campbell. Chauffeur Kabir wants to make a movie celebrating his boss, but it's a snoozefest. So the team go in search of his sordid secrets. (Ep5/6) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: The Rescue Most Brave: Sitcom from Sam Campbell. When a couple become trapped in a cave, Sam hampers the rescue mission to buy more time to make a complex foot-based animated movie. (Ep6/6) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Prague
programme.desc: Comedian Adam Buxton and Joe Lycett peruse Prague's wonders, as they kayak down the River Vltava, sample sausages out of skulls and caviar-laced ice cream, and enjoy a beer spa. [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Kent, Stephanie and Ian's home, a tiny version of the Palace of Versailles, amazes their guests. Is their food as impressive? Later in the week, there's dressing up - and stripping off. [S]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart's Comet: Bart spots a comet. And it's heading straight for Springfield... Quick, everyone, to the Flanders bomb shelter! (S6 Ep14/25) [AD,S]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homie the Clown: Heavily in debt to Fat Tony, Krusty agrees to set up a clown college, and Homer can't resist the opportunity to start a new career... (S6 Ep15/25) [AD,S]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer the Great: Homer becomes a member of a secret society, where the main man spots something significant on Homer's anatomy... Guest starring Patrick Stewart. (S6 Ep12/25) [AD,S]

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Black List: Doug tries to find his 'roots' when Deacon snubs him for a new Black friend. And Carrie's manicurist refuses to see her. (S7 Ep16/22) [AD,S]

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Wish Boned: Doug agrees to take Arthur on a trip to St Louis, on the condition that he never has to see his naked back again. But all does not go to plan. (S7 Ep17/22) [AD,S]

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Van, Go: Doug upsets a waiter so much that she demands to fight him once he's finished his meal. (S7 Ep18/22) [AD,S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Max McGrath dan rekan aliennya, Steel, harus menggunakan dan menggabungkan kekuatan baru mereka nan luar biasa untuk berubah menjadi pahlawan super Max Steel.

programme.title: Stories from Franz
programme.desc: Franz, sebagai yang terkecil di kelas, sangat terbuka untuk menerima saran. Ketika Franz menemukan seorang influencer, kedua sahabatnya skeptis. Akhirnya, ketiganya menemukan kembali apa yang mereka pikir telah hilang: persahabatan terbesar di dunia.

programme.desc: Ini adalah tahun baru di perkemahan berkuda musim panas tetapi semuanya berbeda kali ini - konselor kepala baru, teman-teman baru untuk dijelajahi, dan untuk memeriahkan suasana, pekerja peternakan jatuh hati pada instruktur berkuda utama.

programme.title: The most (un)boring school...
programme.desc: Max dan teman-teman sekelasnya harus mematuhi lebih dari 777 aturan absurd setiap hari. Hukuman berat pun diancamkan untuk pelanggaran sekecil apa pun. Untungnya, ada perlawanan. Rasputin Krampus dari biro anti-kebosanan sedang menyusun rencana untuk mengembalikan keceriaan ke sekolah.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: Best Sellers
programme.desc: Seorang penulis pensiunan yang rewel dan enggan memulai tur buku terakhirnya untuk membantu penerbit muda.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo

programme.title: Dinner Date

In this episode, Real Housewives of Cheshire star Ester Dee is going to be given five menus, each of which has been put together by a potential blind date - the five men behind the menus have all come up with a three-course meal, but Ester will only be having dinner with three of them. Ester will choose her dates based on the menus that she most likes the look of, but who will she want to see for seconds when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done?

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.desc: Morse's investigation into a shocking act of violence at an Oxford degree ceremony uncovers some secrets involving a world-famous opera singer and a business tycoon due to be honoured in the ceremony - a devoted fan of the high-class diva, Morse is dismayed and disappointed by what he eventually uncovers.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Is the death of a wealthy industrialist found dead in his study related to a discovery made at his chemical factory - and is his wife all that she seems?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When Madame Giselle is murdered by a poisoned dart on a flight from Paris to London, fellow passenger Hercule Poirot finds himself caught up in the investigation and learns that the victim was known as a money-lender. On his return to Paris, Poirot discovers his chief suspect is a mysterious American - an enigma in itself as there was no American on the flight.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When business magnate Rex Fortescue, his young wife and their maid are found murdered, Miss Marple notices that the circumstances recall the nursery rhyme Sing a Song of Sixpence - it is not long before she discovers that secrets run deep in the Fortescue family, but the significance of the song itself is harder to unravel. A scandal then looms out of the shadowy past - and Miss Marple begins to wonder if there is any rhyme or reason to the deaths at all.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The very first case of a detective series based on novels by Caroline Graham. Badger's Drift is the perfect English village - beautiful and orderly, it excludes an air of timeless charm and remains apparently undisturbed by upheavals in the outside world. However, the sleepy calm of this small community with long-held secrets is shattered when one of its elderly residents, Emily Simpson, is found dead in her home - a post-mortem reveals the cause of death to be a blow to the head, but who engineered the death of this harmless old lady and why? Enter DCI Barnaby, who is quietly spoken, intelligent, tough-minded and ruthlessly determined to hunt the guilty party down.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama based on characters created by crime writer Ann Cleeves. Vera's reunion with Stuart Macken, her first-ever sergeant, occurs under tragic circumstances when his house is petrol bombed - Stuart is badly burned by the attack and his 18-year-old daughter Stella is left fighting for her life in intensive care. Vera is shocked to see that Stuart is a shadow of the man that she knew 20 years before, and she is faced with some long-buried memories of her own when her investigation uncovers unpleasant revelations about his personal life.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The villagers organise a group protest against Lord Ashfordly's refusal to allow ramblers across his land. Meanwhile, a convicted armed robber returns to Aidensfield. His reappearance leaves people to presume it is so he can collect the money once stolen from the bank. Greengrass finds a new vocation as a lucky chimney sweep.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Harriet Farmer wakes up after being in a coma since the night she tried to elope. Harriet's boyfriend Finn Robson has been missing since the couple tried to run away together a year before. When Edward Stannington - the president of the local chess society - is found dead in a lake with an ice pick in his back, his damaged car is nearby and Kate finds a clue in his mouth, a chess notation known as the Sicilian Defence. Could the attack which left Harriet for dead a year ago be linked to moves on a chess board, and where is her boyfriend Finn?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

In the peaceful English village of Burton Mantle, the tranquillity of the nearby commune is shattered by the violent and unexplained death of its founder Ian Cragie - it's up to DCI Barnaby and his eager sidekick Sergeant Troy to find the motive and the murderer from assembled social misfits including an heiress, a psychic, and a boy who has lost his tongue.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin investigate a shocking crime in which a man is attacked and has his kidney removed. Suspecting organ trafficking, they discover that the kidney was earmarked to be transplanted into a wealthy recipient. When the case comes to court, Crown Prosecutors James Steele and Alesha Phillips are surprised to find a familiar face leading the defence team, and realise that the crux of the issue is the question of how far one should go to help a loved one.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Matt are surprised when a middle-class white girl who is found dead turns out to have been a drug mule. Her parents are distraught and baffled, but the investigation reveals that the perfect daughter who was about to go to university also had a secret life. There is a mysterious boyfriend nobody ever met and there are rumours of an active sex life and a coke dealer who disappeared. Gradually it becomes clear that the girl's motive was love, but the case falls apart when the sole witness retracts his statement.
