programme.desc: Detective drama featuring Colin Dexter's enigmatic chief inspector. Morse investigates a murder that takes him away from the familiar setting of 20th-century Oxford to solving a canal murder in Oxford in 1859 - he becomes convinced that the boatmen publicly hanged for the murder were victims of a gross miscarriage of justice and, nearly 140 years after their deaths on the gallows, sets out to establish the true facts of the case.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is crushed to death by a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue, Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case. Debbie Moffett worked at the dairy, founded by her colleague Jim Caxton, who seems more anxious about his precious cheese than Debbie's death. Later, Debbie's lover Oliver Ordish is garrotted with cheese wire and covered with cheese fly larvae. Jones then discovers that dairy owner Gregory Brantner was paying the dead man a consultancy fee. That night Gregory goes to investigate an alarm at the dairy and is stabbed through the heart with a cheese needle. Can Barnaby and Jones stop the killer before the bitterness of the past leads to yet more agonising deaths?

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama based on the novel of the same name by Ann Cleeves. Vera and the team investigate the case of a murdered social worker called Jenny Lister, a woman who was universally considered to have been principled and popular - in an overworked and understaffed social work system, a notorious case involving the death of a child seems to hold the key to solving the killing. Vera uses her innate empathy and intuition to pursue the truth behind the murder - when she discovers the real secret at the heart of Jenny's death, the killer will stop at nothing to keep it hidden.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks agrees to help his old friend and partner DS Jimmy Valentine in an undercover drug sting. But a gun is pulled and someone ends up dead. What appears to be a tragic mistake is investigated by internal affairs and DS Matt Devlin who fears Jimmy is not all he seems. As they push for the truth the spotlight turns on Ronnie and, in particular, his dark past as a functioning alcoholic when a ten year old drug case was left with no witnesses and a large quantity of missing heroin. The evidence is stacking up against the police and James Steel and Alesha Phillips of the CPS battle Valentine's barrister, Evelyn Wyndham, to bring enough evidence to court. The jigsaw piece that will win it for them is Ronnie. But he refuses to testify. Is there something suspect in Ronnie's past that will end his career now? Can the CPS find any other way of proving their case or in court will it be Valentine's Day?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The drama based on the hit US show, which opens with a hard-hitting, emotional and thought-provoking episode dealing with the moral complexities of policing the crimes of minors and putting children on trial. When a young child is murdered, the terrifying CCTV footage of the boy being led to his death haunts both the police officers and legal team involved in the case. Detectives Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin find their investigation is made more shocking because the two suspects in the frame are children themselves - and each child blames the other. Can forensic evidence determine which youngster is responsible for the strangling of little Conor? Prosecutor George Castle defies his superiors and takes instruction from Conor's mother, who proves to have a surprising point of view on the crime. But can the justice system - and ultimately the government - afford to be lenient?

programme.title: Sharpe

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. The Franco-Spanish frontier, 1813 - a carriage travelling through the Spanish countryside is ambushed by French soldiers and a young nun flees in terror... however, when the soldiers are themselves attacked by the English later on, a French colonel kills his captain.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. June 1813 - the South Essex is seriously short of men, and when the Duke of Wellington is told that there are no recruits available, he sends Sharpe to England to investigate. When Sharpe and Harper arrive, they are informed that there are 700 men waiting for them in Chelmsford - however, Sharpe finds the barracks deserted with no sign of his missing regiment. He and Harper decide to assume other identities and enlist - recruited by Sergeant Havercamp, Sharpe and Harper arrive at a training camp near the estate of Sir Henry Simmerson where they are trained mercilessly. Sharpe discovers that the new recruits are being auctioned to other regiments and returns to the Horse Guards with this information to entrust it to an old friend called Lawford... but Lawford wants to avoid a scandal and promptly tells Lord Fenner, who tries to have Sharpe killed. With the help of Fenner's mistress Lady Anne, Sharpe must now find the proof to implicate Fenner.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. 1803, Portsmouth - Hornblower is reduced to the rank of lieutenant as a result of the peace treaty with France, but Admiral Pellew does not trust their new friend Bonaparte and sends Hornblower off to France on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Force 10 from Navarone
programme.desc: Wartime sequel to the classic 1951 film The Guns of Navarone. Mallory and Miller are back - it seems that there was a traitor with them at Navarone that they thought had been killed, but now it appears that not only was he not executed, but he was actually a German spy. Military intelligence believes that he made it to Yugoslavia and is now with its partisan movement, so Mallory and Miller are sent - along with a military unit called Force 10, who have their own agenda - to find the traitor.

programme.title: Red Heat
programme.desc: Buddy cop action. Captain Ivan Danko of the Moscow Militia witnesses his partner gunned down by Georgian drug kingpin Viktor Rostavili, who flees the Soviet Union and heads to the United States - when Chicago cop Art Ridzic arrests Rostavili on murder charges and Danko is despatched to retrieve him, the two officers then find themselves unexpectedly partnered together when Viktor escapes custody. The taciturn Danko and street-wise Ridzic make for a mismatched pair, but the duo overcome their initial suspicions of each other and develop a mutual professional respect over the course of several violent run-ins with Rostavili and his American drug partners.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Margaret and Ken try to track down sheep rustlers and rare egg smugglers, and Harry is running afternoon tea dances for pensioners at the Plaza Suite and also has to deal with the unwanted attentions of an admirer.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and Carter are called in when alarm bells start ringing all over their patch, but who is setting them off and why?

programme.title: ITV Racing Live: Royal Ascot
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents live coverage of the final race on day one of Royal Ascot. [S]

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. In the heart of central America - a land known for its remote jungle waterways - lurks a creature believed to reach eight feet in length and weigh up to 300 pounds. It instils fear in all who encounter it as it's known to leap into fishermen's boats and cause fatal injuries - Jeremy Wade is taken to breaking point as he relearns everything he knows about fishing in an attempt to catch this illusive and deadly river monster.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank contemplate giving Danielle a pay rise while having high hopes for a Kiss pinball machine and two Laurel and Hardy costume heads.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Pirelli Emilia Romagna Round as the 4.226km track at the Misano Circuit pushes the riders to their limits. [S]

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly tackles the most dangerous haul of the season, trucking a multi-million dollar, 100-tonne load across the entire state of Alaska. Elsewhere, Alex Debogorski races to keep pace in the load count, and Ray Veilleux faces the worst night of his career.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli. [S]

programme.title: Goodbye, pet
programme.desc: Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais' classic comedy-drama series about a group of British builders in search of employment. The lads are impatient to be off to Spain, but things begin to go wrong just as they reach the departure lounge when Dennis gets a phone call from Ally saying they are not going yet due to complications - once these are all sorted out, they finally fly out that weekend by pretending to be tourists and sharing a plane with the Spennymoor and District Senior Citizens Society.

programme.title: Really Horror

programme.title: Really Horror
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Satan's Entrusted Child
programme.desc: Anak Titipan Setan bercerita tentang Putri (Gisella Anastasia) yang harus kembali kedesanya dari Australia karena keluarganya di desa Meloyo Kidul, Surakarta sedangkena masalah besar.

programme.title: Tulah 6/13
programme.desc: Gilang memutuskan untuk berlibur bersama Sarah dan Kevin, dua orang sahabatnya sejak SMA untuk merayakan ulang tahunnya. Rencana tersebut terganggu dengan kehadiran dua orang tamu tak diundang.

programme.title: Komeng electoral district
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Diary Putih Abu Abu
programme.desc: Sekelompok cewek yang bersekolah di pinggiran Jakarta bertemu dan bersahabat karena memiliki kesamaan. Keakraban mereka mulai dikenal karena konten yang sering mereka posting di social media.

programme.title: Si Doel The Movie 2
programme.desc: Kabar bahwa Doel bertemu dengan mantan kekasih dan anaknya membuat Zaenab bingung memilih: mempertahankan pernikahannya dengan Doel, atau merelakannya. Terlebih saat Doel mengatakan bahwa Sarah dan Dul akan menetap di Jakarta

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose
programme.desc: Serial komedi Apose adalah kepanjangan dari Anak Podcast Sejati. Drama ini akan mengisahkan tentang pekerjaan podcaster di Indonesia termasuk bagaimana pekerjaan seorang podcaster di balik layar.

programme.title: Hoax
programme.desc: Tentang keluarga yang anggotanya memiliki rahasia masing-masing. Kisah bermula ketika Ragil, Adek dan Raga, selesai berkumpul di rumah bapaknya. Setelah mereka pulang, konflik yang dialami tiga saudara ini terkuak.

programme.title: Little Rebels Cinema Club
programme.desc: Seorang remaja 14 tahun, bercita-cita membuat film bersama sahabat-sahabatnya. Mereka terinspirasi adegan film zombie yang pernah mereka tonton satu kali dan berusaha mereplikasinya menggunakan handycam milik kakak laki-lakinya.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda

programme.title: Juki
programme.desc: Berada pada puncak ketenarannya, Juki dicintai banyak orang karena sikapnya yang polos, jenaka, dan berani untuk beda. Hingga sebuah kesalahan membuatnya berbalik menjadi musuh nomor satu masyarakat.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda

programme.title: Vidi-O-Call

programme.title: Tiba - Tiba Berondong

programme.title: Dapuk

programme.desc: From 2018. The team investigates a case where a man has fallen overboard and drowned. Torres is selected to mentor three high school students.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2021. Carmen lost her husband Mike. After a neck injury, she lost her job as a data management specialist. Being alone at home and without a job created anxiety that triggered Carmen's hoarding disorder.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2021. Kate grew up with a domineering father and a submissive mother, and the loss of her husband has left her with an overwhelming grief. Kate's home is in complete chaos and the council fines her daily.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Tom and the dog Lukas start their long-awaited holiday, a trip to Tenerife. The gang from Buskerud goes on a segway trip. After days of preparation, Svein can finally welcome his good friend, Linni.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. After a late night, Svein and Linni will cycle to Gran Canaria's healer to cleanse their bodies. In Tenerife, Tom and the dog Lukas will follow in Thor Heyerdahl's footsteps by visiting his museum.

programme.desc: From 2025. Gunilla invites a bunch of celebrities to dinner to talk about their experiences. Two men have made her heart beat a little faster, and now she meets them again to find out who she likes best.

programme.title: Hell week

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Killers and an ex-Army agent take part in a ruthless millionaire's annual island manhunt.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Ketika mantan agen Pasukan Khusus Matt Collins memenangkan kompetisi bertahan hidup, ia menjadi "manusia terkuat di dunia" - sasaran empuk bagi jutawan bejat Danton Vachs, yang perburuan tahunannya menarik para pembunuh paling kejam di dunia.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Seorang peternak kecil setuju untuk menahan seorang penjahat yang tertangkap, yang sedang menunggu kereta untuk pergi ke pengadilan di Yuma. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi saat penjahat itu mencoba mengelabui peternak tersebut.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood

programme.desc: Para penyintas bersatu menghadapi bencana besar. AERA melancarkan misi bom sonar ke kawah gunung, sementara berbagai kelompok berjuang menyelamatkan diri dan mengevakuasi anak-anak yang terjebak.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Di dunia masa depan yang dilanda penyakit, seorang narapidana dikirim kembali ke masa lalu untuk mengumpulkan informasi tentang virus buatan manusia yang telah memusnahkan sebagian besar populasi manusia di planet ini.

programme.title: The Legend 2

programme.desc: Seorang terpidana pemerkosa, dibebaskan dari penjara setelah menjalani hukuman empat belas tahun, mengintai keluarga pengacara yang awalnya membelanya.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 1
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire, Pt 1
programme.desc: Ledakan gunung berapi memicu serangkaian peristiwa dahsyat serupa dalam efek domino yang mengancam akan memusnahkan planet ini kecuali jika satu orang dapat menghentikannya tepat waktu.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 2
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire, Pt 2
programme.desc: Para penyintas bersatu menghadapi bencana besar. AERA melancarkan misi bom sonar ke kawah gunung, sementara berbagai kelompok berjuang menyelamatkan diri dan mengevakuasi anak-anak yang terjebak.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Di dunia masa depan yang hancur karena penyakit, seorang narapidana dikirim kembali ke masa lalu untuk mengumpulkan informasi tentang virus buatan manusia yang memusnahkan sebagian besar populasi manusia di planet ini.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Di dunia masa depan yang hancur karena penyakit, seorang narapidana dikirim kembali ke masa lalu untuk mengumpulkan informasi tentang virus buatan manusia yang memusnahkan sebagian besar populasi manusia di planet ini.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Setelah seorang panglima perang yang berkhianat membunuh tuan mereka dan membuang kaum mereka, 47 samurai tanpa pemimpin bersumpah untuk membalas dendam dan mengembalikan kehormatan kepada kaum mereka.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang peternak kecil setuju untuk menahan seorang penjahat yang tertangkap, yang sedang menunggu kereta untuk pergi ke pengadilan di Yuma. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi saat penjahat itu mencoba mengelabui peternak tersebut.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2 (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Pahlawan Kanton Fong Sai Yuk terlibat dengan perkumpulan rahasia Red Flower untuk menggulingkan kekaisaran Manchu. Di tengah perjuangan politik, ia harus menghadapi konflik moral dan rumitnya kehidupan cintanya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Spy Kids: All The Time In The World
programme.desc: The action packed franchise is back…with the next generation of Spy Kids!

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: The Legend
programme.desc: Martial artists join Red Lotus Flower Society to overthrow evil emperor. Governor hunts society members. Kung fu practitioner falls for merchant's daughter amid kung fu contest for her hand. Gender role reversal comedy ensues.

programme.title: The Trouble With Spies
programme.desc: A third-rate British spy is sent to an island, unaware he is there to lure Soviet spies.

programme.title: Phantom Racer
programme.desc: 17 years ago, Sawyer caused the death of McCullough. When Sawyer becomes the prime suspect in a series of murders, he realizes his ex-girlfriend and her daughter are also in danger.

programme.title: Fist From Shaolin
programme.desc: A Shaolin warrior battles slave traders to stop his countrymen from being sold into bondage in the gold mines in America.

programme.desc: Sebuah film misteri supranatural dengan seorang detektif yang menyelidiki pembunuhan yang tampaknya merupakan akibat dari kutukan.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Kematian misterius ternak dan cahaya aneh di langit membuat seorang ilmuwan muda penasaran.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Tiga gadis diculik dan dibawa ke sebuah pulau terpencil. Mereka ditawan oleh tiga kakak beradik yang dibesarkan secara terpisah oleh nenek mereka.

programme.title: Korat Fight: The Dream
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari Korat bermimpi menjadi petarung hebat. Dengan teknik Muay Korat dan tekad kuat, ia menghadapi berbagai rintangan dan lawan tangguh demi membuktikan diri dan meraih mimpinya di arena.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Kehidupan sepuluh orang asing saling bersinggungan melalui serangkaian peristiwa mengerikan ketika jamur yang bermutasi mulai menyebar di sebuah kota kecil dan memusnahkan setiap orang yang bersentuhan dengannya.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: Berlatar tahun 70-an, 7ujuh menceritakan kisah tragis sekelompok tujuh sahabat yang sedang liburan semester. Mereka memutuskan untuk melakukan perjalanan darat ke sebuah bungalow terpencil yang dirawat oleh kepala desa dan putrinya, Suri.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Chapter 1: Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak, sang istri hantu, kembali untuk membalas dendam atas seorang wanita hamil yang mengalami pelecehan seksual dan kehilangan bayinya. Tidak seorang pun dapat mengenali si penyerang kecuali Mae Nak, yang berubah menjadi roh jahat untuk menghukum si penyerang atas perbuatan jahatnya.

programme.title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
programme.desc: Sebuah film aksi okultisme di mana sebuah tim yang terdiri dari beberapa orang melawan roh jahat.

programme.title: Single In Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho adalah seorang pemengaruh terkenal yang mengagungkan kehidupan lajang. Hyeon-Jin adalah seorang editor yang sangat ingin menemukan pasangan. Keduanya bertemu saat bekerja bersama untuk sebuah buku.

programme.title: Escape From Mogadishu
programme.desc: Anggota kedutaan Korea Utara dan Korea Selatan harus bekerja sama untuk melarikan diri dari Somalia yang dilanda perang.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Im Dong-hwan menemukan jasad ibunya yang hilang setelah empat puluh tahun. Bertekad untuk menemukan kebenaran di balik hilangnya ibunya, ia memulai perjalanan yang mengerikan untuk mengungkap rahasia kelam keluarganya.

programme.title: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: Dua tentara, seorang warga Korea Selatan paruh baya dan seorang remaja Korea Utara, bertemu di Front Barat selama Perang Korea. Tak lama setelah perebutan sebuah tank, mereka menyadari bahwa mereka berdua adalah korban perang dan membentuk persaudaraan.

programme.title: Pretty Crazy (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang calon koki kue hidup tanpa menyadari bahwa setiap malam ia berubah menjadi iblis betina yang liar. Keluarganya menyewa tetangga mereka untuk mengawasi wujud malamnya, sementara si tetangga jatuh cinta pada wujud siangnya dan berusaha mematahkan kutukannya.

programme.title: Cold Eyes
programme.desc: Sebuah tim polisi pengintai yang memiliki peralatan teknologi mutakhir berupaya untuk menangkap sekelompok perampok bank sadis. Dibintangi oleh Hyo-ju Han, Woo-sung Jung dan Jin Kyung.

programme.title: The Bad Guys: Reign Of Chaos
Kingmaker
programme.desc: Film ini didasarkan pada kisah anekdotal tentang hubungan kerja antara Kim Dae-jung dan ahli strategi politiknya, Uhm Chang-rok. Seo Chang-dae adalah seorang ahli strategi politik yang mengutamakan kemenangan di atas segalanya, sedangkan Kim Woon-beom adalah seorang politisi dengan ambisi menjadi presiden terkemuka. Namun, konflik internal dalam kampanye muncul saat Seo Chang Dae mendesak Kim Woon Bum untuk melakukan beberapa taktik curang.

programme.title: Escape From Mogadishu
programme.desc: Anggota kedutaan Korea Utara dan Korea Selatan harus bekerja sama untuk melarikan diri dari Somalia yang dilanda perang.

programme.title: Pretty Crazy
programme.desc: Seorang calon koki kue hidup tanpa menyadari bahwa setiap malam ia berubah menjadi iblis betina yang liar. Keluarganya menyewa tetangga mereka untuk mengawasi wujud malamnya, sementara si tetangga jatuh cinta pada wujud siangnya dan berusaha mematahkan kutukannya.

programme.title: Cold Eyes (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Sebuah tim pengawasan polisi berteknologi tinggi berupaya untuk menangkap geng perampok bank yang kejam.

programme.title: Hopeless (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang remaja ingin melarikan diri dari kampung halamannya di mana kekerasan sering terjadi di antara tetangga. Karena putus asa membutuhkan uang, ia bergabung dengan sebuah geng untuk membantu keluarganya. Hidup barunya mulai terjebak dalam situasi yang semakin berbahaya saat ia berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Im Dong-hwan menemukan jasad ibunya yang hilang setelah empat puluh tahun. Bertekad untuk menemukan kebenaran di balik hilangnya ibunya, ia memulai perjalanan yang mengerikan untuk mengungkap rahasia kelam keluarganya.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Seorang penagih utang menderita kanker hati dan harus mendapatkan transplantasi hati dalam sepuluh hari. Seorang penipu bersedia mendonorkan hatinya jika ia bisa melacak pria yang memasukkannya ke dalam penjara.

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.desc: Would you like a bit of nostalgia? The BMW 328 was considered the dream sports car of the 1930s. Not only is it beautiful, but it was also very successful in motorsport. Rearview mirror introduces the brisk Bavaria. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: New entry-level bikes from Triumph and BMW
programme.desc: Hardly anyone represents the myth of the Triumph motorcycle brand like Steve McQueen. The actor and racing driver would certainly be excited today about the brand new entry-level Street Twin model, with which the traditional British brand wants to assert itself against increasing competition in nostalgic motorcycles. The 900 cc model from Thai production combines classic design with the latest technology. Our driving report shows how the new Triumph Street Twin, the entry-level model in the Bonneville series, performs during test drives in Valencia. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. What motivates the scrap dealer? What stories can the gas station attendant tell? (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Dülmen near Münster – this is where one of the most spectacular German sports cars is handcrafted: the Wiesmann. It arose from an obsession of the car-crazy brothers Friedhelm and Martin Wiesmann, who managed to build their own sports car company with passion and persistence. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. The VW 181, called the ''Kübel'', was presented in 1969 as one of the most bizarre cars ever built: open, spacious, solid, cheap and four-door. Designed for the Bundeswehr, it initially found hardly any civilian buyers. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Good and conservative, American and avant-garde - in the 60s and 70s, Ford built one classic after another and always according to the Ford formula: simple technology, pleasant shape, affordable price. Taunus, bathtub, escort and Capri, today they are all cult. Car History shows the Ford classics. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Today it's about bestsellers and long-running favorites: Seat's best-selling model is celebrating its birthday: the Ibiza turns 40! To mark the milestone anniversary, the manufacturer is releasing a special model. We test it and take a look back at the successes of this small car. And the big comparison: Mitsubishi ASX competes against its sister models Nissan Juke and Renault Captur. Who is ahead? (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Mercedes Simplex is the ancestor of the Mercedes models. It was built from 1902 to 1906. Wilhelm Maybach once developed the Simplex as a successor to the Mercedes 35 HP. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: In Dubai, the legendary Supercars police fleet hunts down speeders and illegal parkers. And at MTM and Alpina they get more power from the Audis and BMWs. The Audi S8 MTM Talladega R starts with a whopping 802 hp. And the Stuck brothers Johannes and Ferdinand drive the Alpina D5 over the track and delight us with happy flying stunts. We can only hope that the police don't notice. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The second season of the unique report series “Stunt Heroes” also offers endless action. Breathtaking car stunts, spectacular motorcycle crashes, daring body stunts. The stuntmen from Action Concept are leaders in their field across Europe. Stunt coordinator Christoph Domanski looks back at the stunts from the last twelve shows and explains why a stunt sometimes works better in a test than on a film set. The show summarizes all the stunts of the second season and shows how creatively cars are destroyed, motorcycles destroyed and film stunts are implemented - garnished with the best outtakes! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Narkus Neser take part in the Black Forest Winter Challenge, one of the funniest winter rallies in Germany (channel info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: What has long been known in motorsport is also finding its way more and more into road vehicles: lightweight construction. Carbon is often the keyword here. The small series manufacturer Roding from the Upper Palatinate produces a sports car that, despite a relatively low output of 320 hp, even outshines the Porsche GT3 with a power-to-weight ratio of 2.98 kilos per hp. Several super-light sports cars come from England: Lotus, Caterham and Radical know how to really slim down. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Spring awakening at Motorcycles: We track down the most important current motorcycle trends at one of the many bike trade fairs, the IMOT in Munich. Large travel enduros, maxi scooters and practical bikes are very trendy, as are the latest versions of super athletes. We are also testing the brand new maxi scooters from BMW for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Emotion paired with journalistically independent, critical competence: the magazine is current and diverse. Emotional entertainment, serious and critical information as well as service with useful value are the concept of the show.Challenge Bibendum. Shanghai, Olympics of alternative drive concepts. Today: Traveling in Croatia with the Jeep Wrangler. Pre-war racing cars, touring cars and Formula 1 pilots. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The traditional brands Jaguar and Land Rover are experiencing a huge upheaval under the umbrella of the Indian Tata Group. Jaguar is rejuvenating itself significantly, Land Rover is expanding with more and more new models. MOTORVISION TV shows how the tightrope walk between tradition and innovation is successful and what role the label “Made in England” plays in this. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: An electrifying future begins. It took a while for e-mobility to gain momentum, but now the manufacturers are stepping on the gas! With the Kia E-Niro and the Hyundai Ioniq we are testing how well Nice and Hamburg are prepared for electromobility. Also: The aCar from the Technical University of Munich is intended to bring electric drives to emerging countries. And at a competitive price of 10,000 euros. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: BMW M5, Mercedes-AMG E63, Audi RS6 or Mulsanne Speed, power sedans offer a unique combination of style, performance and everyday usability. They combine the luxury of a limousine with the dynamics of a super sports car. Dream Cars presents the fastest and most exciting power sedans in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Opel record racing car, called the 'Black Widow'. Built as an unofficial secret project, the limousine converted from an honest man to an arsonist caused a sensation on the race track in the late 1960s. Well-known drivers such as Erich Bitter and Niki Lauda achieved numerous successes with the 180 hp Rüsselsheimer. Then the race car mysteriously disappeared. Now the Black Widow is back and Motorvision was there for the first rollout on the racetrack. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With the E-Tron S, Audi is expanding its fleet of electric drive vehicles and at the same time delivering a high-performance Sportback model. Also: the Brandlhof near Salzburg is one of the largest off-road parks in Europe. Toyota offers something very special there: a driving school where SUV and off-road vehicle drivers can sharpen their off-road skills away from the asphalt. And: the third generation of the Porsche Panamera. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the car of reason, it is not exciting, but it is the mega seller: the VW Golf, the most successful car in Europe, sold 30 million times. The Golf is mass compatible, classless and it dominates the compact car class. Because of its success, it has long been called the golf class. The models from the I series have long been cult, especially the legendary Golf Gti and the Golf convertible. Car History tells the story of the Golf generation and explains the secret of its success. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The Air Show in Montabaur - At this year's airfield festival, daring pilots gather in their rare aircraft to show what can be conjured up in the sky in unique air shows (channel information).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Cars from Asia are successful worldwide and there is an enormous variety. For example the Subaru BRZ. With 234 hp and incredible handling, it offers adrenaline rushes at a low price. The Mitsubishi Colt has been a bestseller since the 1980s. Now the seventh generation follows. How good is it compared to the competition? (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Would you like everyday vehicles with an extra portion of steam under the hood? The BMW 3 Series, Nissan 370 Z or Citroen DS3 are the norms of everyday life. But in the M version, Nismo or as a Musketeer, the performance is really good. Then sport is the order of the day. 431 hp give the Bavarian its legs. Japan's Nismo-370 produces 344 hp and the Citroen Musketeer DS3 Tiburon brings 222 French horses to the start. A happy round of fast 3 Series models for more driving fun on our roads. The story of the Three Musketeers is slightly rewritten here and told in a completely different way. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For the showreel, the stunt heroes at action concept film an epic body fight between law enforcement officers and outlaws on the run - and the full program: severe beatings in close combat, glass bottles burst on heads, bodies fly through walls. Finally, the gangster car flies over 15 meters high, detonates in the air and leaves a trail of destruction behind. Full double action in one episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed ​​Stories, presenter Martin Utberg welcomes the managing director of the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk, Sven Bössow, in his home town of Seefeld in Tyrol. He questions him in detail about the dream work and about Sven's career. Martin also drives some special Porsche models in this episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Almost every car manufacturer also has an in-house tuner. Most of the models that are revised there are equipped with more cables and have a sportier look. For many customers, however, that is still not enough: individuality is the key. These customers are the target group of the endless number of smaller tuners who add one more thing to the manufacturers' top models. For example Performmaster from Baden-Württemberg. Their version of the C63 AMG S has 612 instead of 510 hp and 840 Nm maximum torque instead of 700. Supercars is testing this beast and other refined cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: The documentary series offers a unique insight into modern British policing. Camera teams follow police officers as they try to maintain order on England's streets. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: But electric cars are not conquering the world everywhere. Europe is partly lagging behind the trend, which is why attractive vehicles are in demand. With the EV3, Kia is launching a new compact SUV at an affordable price. The EV6 also receives an update. We test both in Portugal. And: Europe's cheapest electric car is also getting an upgrade. We reveal five exciting facts about the Dacia Spring. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.sub-title: All-wheel drive fun on and off-road
programme.desc: All-wheel drive is only fun off-road? Absolutely not! And these two are proof: The Subaru Forester is taking off in its new sixth generation. We check its qualities on and off-road and find out the secret of its success. And this all-wheel drive stunner is probably one of the most extraordinary electric cars. Five exciting facts and a bonus about the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N. (channel information) await you.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Which sports car fan doesn't secretly dream of a Porsche 911. It is THE sports car from Germany. Compact, iconic and stable in value. And that despite the fact that with over 1.3 million units it is one of the most produced sports cars of all time. Classic car dealer Michael Schnabl, founder of Motorlegenden, makes car dreams come true. His specialty: rare and incredibly expensive Porsche models. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.desc: Teleshopping for e.g. cosmetics, jewelry, fashion or household appliances. The consumer is offered the opportunity to select a product of their choice on television and order it from a retailer by telephone, fax, online shop or email.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Teleshopping for e.g. cosmetics, jewelry, fashion or household appliances. The consumer is offered the opportunity to select a product of their choice on television and order it from a retailer by telephone, fax, online shop or email.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is regularly open to the general public. Many people drive through the “grounds of hell” in their private vehicles. Fascinating Nordschleife fans talk about what they associate with the ring.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The “Bavarian Historic Rally”, the smaller counterpart to the famous “Mille Miglia” in Italy, is not about performance and speed. We present automotive gems from this classic car event and hear what their owners have to say.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: When choosing a vehicle, price plays a role, as does equipment, drive, space and much more. There are certain characteristics that manufacturers use to assign their models to a vehicle class. Various vehicles are presented.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Four powered wheels are better than two. This was once established. The Quattro drive is now almost 30 years old. Rearview mirror presents Audi and the Quattro drive. An innovative and very successful story.

programme.desc: We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the corner. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans: the Type 64, which is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Only two of the streamlined cars were built in 1938 and were intended to take part in a race from Berlin to Rome.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: After more than 70 years, Land Rover presents a new edition of the classic Defender. It's also about the world record attempt in drifting in the Porsche Taycan at the Hockenheimring. The team also tests the Porsche 911 Turbo and the 718 Spyder.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The 1960s and 1970s were Opel's Golden Age. At that time, the traditional brand rose to the heights of possibility. Models such as “Ascona”, “Manta”, “Rekord” and “GT” have contributed to the group's success.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: The show shows fast-paced motorsport scenes from dragster races with a large audience.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time the program reports on the Düsseldorf yacht and water sports trade fair "Boot".

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: For many families, size matters. The fully electric KIA EV9 is significantly quieter, but visually just as brutal as the BMW XM. In the family check we find out whether it is perhaps the best electric car for large families.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: when the new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the "Mille Miglia" in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the public with an electric car in 1900.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: Mercedes house tuner AMG is starting another star war. The C 63 AMG, E 63 S AMG and the S 63 AMG outperform each other in terms of performance data. AMG uses large-volume, bassy, ​​rumbling high-performance drives.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A skidding truck competes against a remote-controlled Chrysler on the highway. Stunt coordinator Domanski's goal is to take the roof off the Chrysler. If everything goes according to plan, the stunt will result in a new convertible.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: The Swiss Spirit magazine invites you to the “Spirit Driving Days” in Seefeld in Tyrol. The participants go on a 230-kilometer tour through the Alps in their vintage cars. A highlight of the route is the Engalm natural forest reserve.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: The Nissan GT-R and the new Porsche 911 with a turbo engine have to prove their winter suitability in the show. Because despite sub-zero temperatures and snow, driving fun doesn't have to be neglected if the engine is right.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: Regardless of whether it's about drug-related crime, house searches and chases: the series follows a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thames Valley.

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: We accompany the Canadian young racing driver Damon Surzyshyn and the racing team TechSport Racing.

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show showcases some of the best motorsport moments, from karts to Formula One.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, and not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, and not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars are conquering the world - but not everywhere. Europe is partly lagging behind the trend, which is why attractive vehicles are in demand. With the EV3, Kia is launching a new compact SUV at an affordable price. The EV6 also receives an update.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: All-wheel drive is only fun off-road? Absolutely not! And these two are proof: We check the new Subaru Forester on and off-road. And: This all-wheel drive stunner is probably one of the most extraordinary electric cars. Five facts about the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: Darryl travels to Exmouth to support colleagues on an operation involving a man who is threatening his family. Meanwhile, Roger and Mark are waiting on the highway for a car that is suspected of transporting drugs.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph.

programme.title: UIM E1 World Championship 2025
programme.desc: No further information is available for this article.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.

programme.title: Australian Boat Racing 2026
programme.desc: National Driver's Championship, Mildura.

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: No further information is available for this article.

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025

programme.desc: The show shows spectacular and entertaining events that take place on the water.

programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.desc: Two brothers try to fulfill the promise they made to their dying father.

programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E24 — German racing classics! He helped found the legend of the German Silver Arrows: the Mercedes W 125 Grand Prix car from 1937. Big names like Rudolf Caracciola and Manfred von Brauchitsch fight for victories in the single-seater with up to over 600 hp.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E4 — Episode 4In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. This program subjects this model to a detailed practical test. It's also about the Lexus RX and the new Volkswagen e-Up.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes Racing: Beginning of an EraSince 1894, the year of the world's first car race, Mercedes has dominated. The list of successes of the brand with the star is endless. Particularly notable were the wins at the French Grand Prix in 1908 and 1914.
